_publications._publicationTitle: FT895 Impairs Mitochondrial Function in Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumor Cells.

_contextSnippet: while STS26T showed a modest alteration...whereas STS26T and ST8814 exhibited only a partial response
details: Modest alteration in mitochondrial respiration activities and partial response to ATP synthase inhibitor, oxidative phosphorylation uncoupler, and complex I/III inhibitors
